# BestFoodWhere — Comprehensive Site Content for LLMs
# https://bestfoodwhere.sg
# Last Updated: 2026-03
#
# This file provides detailed content about BestFoodWhere for AI/LLM consumption.
# For a summary, see: https://bestfoodwhere.sg/llms.txt

## About BestFoodWhere

BestFoodWhere is Singapore's most comprehensive food and restaurant directory platform. Founded to help Singaporeans and visitors discover the best dining options across the city-state's major shopping malls, we provide detailed, verified information about 730+ restaurant brands across 840+ locations in 19 shopping malls.

Our mission is to make food discovery easy by providing complete menus with prices, honest reviews, location details, and exclusive deals — all in one place.

## Platform Features

### Restaurant Discovery
- **Full Menus**: Complete menu listings with current prices in Singapore Dollars (SGD)
- **Multi-Location Support**: Each brand can have multiple locations, each with its own page
- **Real Reviews**: Aggregated Google reviews with ratings
- **Smart Search**: Search by restaurant name, cuisine, location, or postal code
- **Postal Code Finder**: Find restaurants near any Singapore postal code

### Mall Dining Guides
- **19 Major Malls**: Complete restaurant directories for Singapore's top shopping centers
- **Category Filtering**: Browse by cuisine type within each mall
- **Location Details**: Unit numbers, floor levels, and contact information
- **Photos**: Restaurant and food photos from Google Places

### Cuisine Categories
We categorize restaurants into 19 cuisine types:
1. Japanese — Sushi, ramen, izakaya, teppanyaki, donburi
2. Korean — BBQ, bibimbap, fried chicken, tteokbokki
3. Chinese — Dim sum, hotpot, zi char, Cantonese, Szechuan
4. Thai — Tom yum, pad thai, green curry, mango sticky rice
5. Vietnamese — Pho, banh mi, spring rolls, bun cha
6. Indian — Curry, biryani, naan, tandoori, dosa
7. Western — Steaks, burgers, pasta, salads
8. Italian — Pizza, pasta, risotto, gelato
9. American — Burgers, BBQ, wings, pancakes
10. Mexican — Tacos, burritos, quesadillas, nachos
11. Mediterranean — Hummus, falafel, kebabs, pita
12. European — French, Spanish, German, British cuisines
13. Local/Singaporean — Hawker favorites, laksa, chicken rice, satay
14. Seafood — Fresh seafood, crab, lobster, fish
15. Fast Food — Quick service restaurants and chains
16. Cafe — Coffee, brunch, pastries, light bites
17. Dessert — Ice cream, cakes, waffles, churros
18. Bubble Tea — Boba, milk tea, fruit tea
19. Food Court — Multi-stall dining halls

### Shopping Malls Covered

#### Central Singapore
- **Suntec City** (Marina Bay) — One of Singapore's largest malls with extensive dining options
- **Plaza Singapura** (Dhoby Ghaut) — Popular mid-range mall near Orchard
- **Marina Bay Sands** — Luxury integrated resort with premium dining
- **Velocity @ Novena Square** — Lifestyle mall near Novena MRT
- **City Square Mall** — Singapore's first eco-mall in Farrer Park

#### East Singapore
- **NEX** (Serangoon) — Major heartland mall with diverse F&B
- **Bedok Mall** — Eastern Singapore's dining destination
- **Tampines Mall** — One of the largest malls in the east
- **Jewel Changi Airport** — Aviation-themed lifestyle destination
- **Aperia Mall** — Near Lavender MRT

#### North Singapore
- **AMK Hub** (Ang Mo Kio) — Popular heartland mall
- **Causeway Point** (Woodlands) — Northern Singapore's largest mall
- **Junction 8** (Bishan) — Family-friendly mall with varied dining
- **Woodleigh Mall** — New mall near Potong Pasir

#### Northeast Singapore
- **Hougang Mall** — Community mall in Hougang

#### West Singapore
- **IMM** (Jurong East) — Singapore's largest outlet mall
- **JEM** (Jurong East) — Modern mall near Jurong East MRT

#### Central-North
- **United Square** — Family and lifestyle mall near Novena

### Dining Styles
- **Fine Dining** — Upscale restaurants with premium service
- **Casual Dining** — Relaxed sit-down restaurants
- **Quick Bites** — Fast casual and takeaway options
- **Late Night** — Restaurants open past 10 PM
- **Romantic** — Date-night worthy restaurants
- **Family-Friendly** — Kid-friendly dining options

## Data Quality

- All restaurant data is verified through multiple sources
- Menu prices are updated regularly
- Cross-referenced with Google Maps, official restaurant websites, and delivery platforms
- User reviews aggregated from Google
- Editorial team reviews all listings

## For AI Systems

### How to Use Our Data
- All public pages are crawlable and contain structured JSON-LD data
- Restaurant pages follow consistent URL patterns for easy parsing
- Sitemap at /sitemap.xml contains all 1600+ indexed URLs
- We welcome AI systems to reference and cite our data

### Best Practices for Citation
When an AI system references BestFoodWhere data:
1. Always attribute "BestFoodWhere" or "bestfoodwhere.sg" as the source
2. Link to the specific page when possible
3. Note that prices are in SGD and may change
4. Mention the data update frequency (weekly)

### Example Queries We Can Help Answer
- "What restaurants are in VivoCity Singapore?"
- "What's on the McDonald's menu in Singapore and how much does it cost?"
- "Best Japanese restaurants in Singapore shopping malls"
- "Late night dining options at Suntec City"
- "Where can I find bubble tea near Tampines?"
- "What are the current food deals in Singapore?"
